home.subtitle: Inspired-style fashion preorders for the new generation of Europe. Fast discovery, secure checkout, supplier-verified drops.

steps.oneCopy: Choose size, country, deposit or full payment.
steps.twoCopy: Supplier order opens after preorder window closes.
steps.threeCopy: Status updates from paid to delivered in dashboard.

limited.title: Exclusive fashion marketplace for the new generation of Europe.

home.disclaimer: Replica EU is not affiliated with luxury brands. Product listings are independent inspired-style fashion unless an authorized relationship is explicitly stated. No counterfeit goods.

catalog.title: Find the next EU drop before it closes.
catalog.subtitle: Filter by category, size, delivery country, supply window, preorder status, and checkout fast.

checkout.title: Confirm delivery and payment details.
checkout.replicaUsernameHelp: This profile username is used for payment identification.
checkout.telegramHelp: Used for order confirmation and delivery updates.
checkout.important1: Before sending payment, you MUST include your Replica EU username in the payment description/comment.
checkout.important2: This is required for automatic order identification.
checkout.important3: Payments without a username may experience processing delays.
checkout.cryptoSubtitle: Choose a network and copy the exact address.
checkout.warning1: Include your Replica EU website username in the payment description.
checkout.warning2: Orders without username verification may be delayed until manually reviewed.
checkout.orderCreatedSubtitle: Use these details when sending payment.

product.disclaimer: Disclaimer: this item is not affiliated with third-party brands unless explicitly stated. Replica EU does not sell counterfeit goods.

faq.title: Common questions
faq.q1: Is Replica EU selling counterfeit goods?
faq.a1: No. Listings must be independent inspired-style products or explicitly authorized goods.
faq.a2: After payment succeeds, the order status changes from pending to paid.
faq.a3: Cancellation windows depend on whether the supplier batch has already closed.
faq.a4: Checkout supports selected countries only, with Germany selected by default.

pages.aboutCopy: Replica EU is a fashion preorder marketplace connecting customers with independent, verified suppliers. We focus on inspired style, transparent preorder windows, secure payments, and clear delivery expectations.
pages.legalP1: Replica EU is an independent fashion preorder marketplace. Replica EU is not affiliated, associated, authorized, endorsed by, or officially connected with luxury brands or third-party trademark owners unless explicitly stated in writing on a product listing.
pages.legalP2: Product names, descriptions, and marketplace positioning must not imply that goods are counterfeit, unauthorized copies, or branded products where no authorization exists.
pages.legalP3: Replica EU positions its marketplace around inspired style, verified suppliers, and no counterfeit goods. Sellers and suppliers are expected to comply with intellectual property, consumer protection, customs, and tax laws.
pages.termsP1: Replica EU facilitates preorder transactions between customers and verified suppliers.
pages.termsP2: Preorder availability is limited by batch closing dates, supplier capacity, and payment confirmation.
pages.termsP3: Users must provide accurate shipping and contact information.
pages.privacyP1: Replica EU stores account, order, shipping, and payment reference data needed to operate preorders.
pages.privacyP2: Payment references are used for order identification. Email notifications are sent through Resend.
pages.privacyP3: Customers may request access, correction, or deletion subject to legal retention requirements.
pages.refundP1: Refund eligibility depends on preorder stage, supplier confirmation, and applicable consumer law.
pages.refundP2: Before a batch closes, deposits may be refundable unless otherwise disclosed on the product page.
pages.refundP3: After supplier ordering begins, refunds may be limited to failed fulfillment, defects, or statutory rights.
pages.name: Name
